title: StrategyPatch
description: Cross-run learnings produced by the bounded career-reflect-agent after a discovery run. The agent writes this file only; the worker validates it (strategy_state.apply_strategy_patch) and is the sole writer of strategy_state.json. List fields are merged (union, deduped); recommended_next_searches is replaced; coverage_by_role_category (role category coverage) is merged per key. Unknown fields are rejected.

effective_sources.description: Sources that produced real JD URLs (domain or source type).

avoid_sources.description: Sources to down-weight, each with a failure reason (403 / 404 / bot-blocked / login-required).

effective_query_patterns.description: Query patterns that yielded real job-posting URLs.

avoid_query_patterns.description: Query patterns that only returned aggregator / search-result pages.

coverage_by_role_category.description: Per-role-category coverage assessment (internal key coverage_by_role_category), keyed by label from configs/role_category_taxonomy.yaml.

key_learnings.description: Free-text learnings to accumulate across runs.

recommended_next_searches.description: Priority directions for the next run (replaces the previous value).
